a_image.alt: Cyberpunk style mood board — Subculture · Neon Dystopia

sections.a_eyebrow: Futuristic · Neon · Bold Colors · Techy · Heavy Motion
sections.a_description: Neon cyan slashing through perpetual darkness, chrome surfaces reflecting holographic advertisements, and the high-tech-low-life energy of dystopian megacities — Cyberpunk design brings William Gibson's vision to the browser. The electric accents bleed through dark interfaces like rain-soaked neon signs, creating the visual language of a future where technology has outpaced humanity.

This neon-dystopian style powers sci-fi game interfaces, cybersecurity company branding, hacker culture platforms, and futuristic product launches. You'll see it on Cyberpunk 2077-inspired fan sites, cryptocurrency trading interfaces, dark web-adjacent security tools, and tech startup landing pages — anywhere that the visual language needs to signal the bleeding edge of digital culture.

The neon-drenched, dystopian aesthetic of cyberpunk — electric blues and hot pinks cutting through perpetual darkness, chrome reflections, and the high-tech-low-life energy of a future dominated by megacorporations. Background: near-black with blue tint (#0a0e1a). The .inner panel has a dark blue-gray background (#111827) with a 1px border (rgba(0,255,255,0.2)) and 4px border-radius — a data terminal in a rain-soaked alley. Colors: electric cyan (#00ffff) as the primary accent — the neon glow of cyberpunk cityscapes. Hot pink (#ff2d7b) as secondary. Cold white (#e0f0ff) for headings, muted blue-gray (#7a8ba0) for body text. The aesthetic is high-contrast and futuristic — neon bleeding through darkness like holographic advertisements in the rain. Set in Orbitron — a geometric display font with a distinctly futuristic, mechanical quality. Heading at weight 700, 24px, line-height 1.2, text-transform uppercase, letter-spacing 2px, color #e0f0ff. Eyebrow at weight 500, 10px, uppercase, 4px letter-spacing, color #00ffff. Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height 1.6, color #7a8ba0. Buttons: primary — cyan (#00ffff), dark text (#0a0e1a), 2px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, pink border (#ff2d7b). Alternatives: Rajdhani (angular condensed), Electrolize (tech display).
{What this palette represents — the core identity}
